raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context setting","name":"Before we get specific, what feels most worth talking through today?","description":"Lets Priya set the agenda in a calm, adult-to-adult way before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-launch read","name":"Since Monday, what's felt different in your day-to-day?","description":"Surfaces whether the quieter week is normal post-launch recovery or something more persistent.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet stretch","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter this week, Priya — what's behind that?","description":"Observation-first probe into whether the change in presence is about recovery, focus, or something unresolved.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegate or keep","name":"What work are you keeping close that you'd rather hand off?","description":"Gets at delegation friction and whether she has bandwidth to mentor or coach others.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring thread","name":"What stopped the mentoring idea from moving forward?","description":"Surfaces the real blocker on the stalled mentoring thread without assuming it was lack of interest.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership next quarter","name":"What do you expect to own next quarter?","description":"Clarifies her own mental model of upcoming ownership before new work is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope tradeoff","name":"What would you want to leave off your plate if that next-quarter shape holds?","description":"Forces a concrete trade-off around capacity and protects against hidden overcommitment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Partner alignment","name":"Where do Product or other partners still need a cleaner read from you?","description":"Checks how she is managing expectations around the billing rewrite without naming the unannounced change.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision pressure","name":"What decisions are still fuzzy enough to slow you down?","description":"Finds the specific ambiguity that could create drag in the next stretch of work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Ends the conversation by turning the discussion into concrete support or adjustments.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
